goal: Write advanced sections: branching strategies, GitHub Pages, Git hooks, and self-hosted Git basics.
summary: Phase 3 completed successfully. Created all four Advanced & DevOps Topics sections: 11-branching-strategies.md (GitFlow, trunk-based, feature branching with ASCII diagrams and comparison), 12-github-pages.md (Pages setup, Jekyll basics, themes, branch deployment), 13-git-hooks.md (client-side hooks with real pre-commit example, server-side concepts, management tools), 14-self-hosted-git.md (GitLab and Gitea installation, configuration, comparison, exercise). Each file follows the established style with exercises, solutions, and consistent navigation links. All verified.
stepSummaries:
1. Write 11-branching-strategies.md covering GitFlow, trunk-based development, feature branching with diagrams-as-text, commands, and an exercise. [verified]
  2. Write 12-github-pages.md covering setting up GitHub Pages from a branch or GitHub Actions (concepts only, no CI build), and an exercise. [verified]
  3. Write 13-git-hooks.md covering pre-commit, post-merge, server-side hooks with examples, commands, and an exercise. [verified]
  4. Write 14-self-hosted-git.md covering GitLab and Gitea installation basics, configuration concepts, and an exercise. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to write branching strategies, GitHub Pages, Git hooks, and self-hosted Git basics.
